generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor modeled in BIM and provides temperature telemetry"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureTelemetry
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Occupancy sensor modeled in BIM and provides occupancy telemetry"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyTelemetry
]

instance PowerUsageSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Power usage sensor modeled in BIM and provides power consumption telemetry"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PowerUsageTelemetry
]

instance IlluminationSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Illumination sensor modeled in BIM and provides illumination telemetry"
    DTDFVocab:producedData IlluminationTelemetry
]

instance TemperatureTelemetry : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance OccupancyTelemetry : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance PowerUsageTelemetry : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PowerUsageSensor
]

instance IlluminationTelemetry : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IlluminationSensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature data derived from TemperatureTelemetry"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HonoIngestion
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureTelemetry
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Occupancy data derived from OccupancyTelemetry"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HonoIngestion
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyTelemetry
]

instance PowerUsageData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Power usage data derived from PowerUsageTelemetry"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HonoIngestion
    DTDFVocab:fromData PowerUsageTelemetry
]

instance IlluminationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Illumination data derived from IlluminationTelemetry"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HonoIngestion
    DTDFVocab:fromData IlluminationTelemetry
]

instance HonoIngestion : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono MQTT ingestion for real‑time telemetry"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService,
                     EnergyManagementAnalyticsService,
                     BuildingPerformanceSimulationService
]

instance DittoTwinManager : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto twin management for digital twin operations"
    DTDFVocab:enables UnrealVisualizationService
]

instance BIMTransformationTool : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Model‑driven transformation tool converting BIM to runtime interfaces"
    DTDFVocab:enables LightingOptimizationService
]

instance UnrealEngine5Viewer : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 interactive visualization tool"
    DTDFVocab:enables UnrealVisualizationService
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time monitoring dashboards for building performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeEnergyMonitoringInsight
]

instance EnergyManagementAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive energy‑management analytics service"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnergyManagementInsight
]

instance LightingOptimizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Lighting optimization via reinforcement learning"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlPolicyUpdate
]

instance BuildingPerformanceSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Simulation of building performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationInsight
]

instance UnrealVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Immersive visualization in Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance RealTimeEnergyMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight generated from real‑time monitoring dashboards"
]

instance EnergyManagementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight generated from predictive energy‑management analytics"
]

instance ControlPolicyUpdate : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated control‑policy update based on lighting optimization"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight generated from building performance simulation"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight generated from immersive Unreal Engine 5 visualization"
]

instance LightingControlActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting control actuator mapped in BIM and controlling lighting fixtures"
]

instance HCVDamperActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC damper actuator defined in BIM for airflow control"
]

instance IFCBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Core IFC BIM model of the building"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMTransformationTool
]

instance SensorTelemetryStream : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Sensor telemetry streams for all physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo HonoIngestion
]

instance ControlLogicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Control logic models defined in enriched BIM"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoTwinManager
]

instance RLControlPolicyModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Reinforcement learning control policies for lighting optimization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DittoTwinManager
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control command messages sent from the DT to building actuators via Eclipse Ditto (JSON over MQTT/HTTP) to adjust lighting levels, HVAC set‑points, etc."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Continuous, real‑time data synchronization between the physical building and the twin; updates are processed as soon as sensor events arrive, without fixed sampling intervals specified"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A modular service‑oriented architecture where BIM‑derived component twins are exposed through Ditto, orchestrated by a central twin hub, with visualization and analytics services plugged in via defined extension points."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design (BIM creation), fabrication/installation (device configuration captured in BIM), and operation (live data exchange), covering the building from ideal design through deployed asset."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Semantic alignment verified by ODM and verified through the ODTE metric; periodic synchronization checks; handling of semantic drift via re‑extraction from updated BIM; confidence intervals for predictive models."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Runtime connectivity established through Eclipse Hono (message broker) and Eclipse Ditto (digital twin service) enabling event‑based data flow between the physical building and its twin"
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "Digital twin components are deployed on scalable, orchestrated infrastructure (e.g., cloud or on‑premises) that supports micro‑services and can scale horizontally"
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Interoperability with external platforms through standardized protocols supported by Eclipse Ditto and Hono, facilitating data exchange with other digital twins or legacy systems"
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Uses BIM (IFC) as the standard data model and implements standardized integration mechanisms (Hono, Ditto), ensuring consistent semantic alignment across engineering workflows."
]
